text: "You can't imagine how good it feels to know who I am again.  After all these years, to remember my name is Elsa von Spielburg!"
speaker: elsa

text: "I used to wish I was not a brigand's child but actually an enchanted princess.  Now I know that I really was enchanted, and I don't have to be a brigand any more!"
speaker: elsa

text: "Thank you so much for freeing me."
speaker: elsa

text: "I've got to hurry home to father and get his guards to capture the rest of the brigands before they manage to escape with the treasure.  It must be returned to the rightful owners."
speaker: elsa

text: "Yorick!  Yorick!  I'm me again!"
speaker: elsa

text: "Sorry I took so long.  I got lost."
speaker: yorick

text: "Will your Dad be glad that your spell's been repelled!  We need to go before the brigands know or they'll spoil our show."
speaker: yorick

text: "C'mon!  We'd better make our getaway before they get in our way."
speaker: yorick

text: "Yorick and I can return to the castle with the amulet I wear, but I'm afraid you'll have to get there on your own."
speaker: elsa

text: "There are two Healing Potions in my desk that you may take with you."
speaker: elsa

text: "You should use this secret passage and escape while they are arguing over the treasure.  If they find you in here, you'll be overwhelmed and killed."
speaker: elsa

text: "Thank you again, and good luck!  I'll make sure you are richly rewarded for your bravery."
speaker: elsa

text: "If you decide to counter the curser, then mind the mirror over mere minds.  So tip the canoe and toodleloo!  Elsa, if you do the honors, I'll honor your due."
speaker: yorick
